name: 20 GM Candid Cream IP
about: 20 GM Candid Cream IP is a highly effective cream suitable for all skin types. This cream is designed to provide relief from various skin problems including itchiness, redness, inflammation, and discomfort. Its unique formulation ensures fast and effective results, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth, and healthy. The cream is easy to use and has a smooth texture that spreads evenly on the skin. It comes in a white color and is non-disposable. To ensure its effectiveness, it is recommended to store the cream in a dry place.

faq.q: Is this cream suitable for all skin types?
faq.a: Yes, 20 GM Candid Cream IP is suitable for all skin types.

faq.q: What is the form of this cream?
faq.a: This cream comes in a form of cream.

faq.q: How should I store this cream?
faq.a: It is recommended to store this cream in a dry place.

faq.q: Is this cream easy to use?
faq.a: Yes, this cream is easy to use and has a smooth texture that spreads evenly on the skin.
